blurb: Wild encounters and trainer teams for every location, in story order, from the Brutal Black mastersheet. Tick wild Pokemon as caught and mark trainers beaten to track your run.

areas.name: Nuvema Town
notes: First rival battle is the same

areas.name: Route 1
notes:
The woman who used to give a potion (moved to right in front of first grass patch) now gives:
-1 of each Gem (these are the only ones you get until you fight Pheno)
-1 Exp Share
-10 Heart Scales
-30 Quick Balls
-999 Full Restores
-999 Max Potions
-999 Rare Candies
-999 Max Repels
–999 Max Elixirs

areas.name: Accumula Town
notes: Grass can be found in the far left down the stairs

areas.name: Dreamyard
notes: count this as separate to your Grass encounter

areas.name: Route 3 North

trainers.name: Nursery Aide Autumn
notes: Wait until at least Clay Split before doing this fight)
Rustling grass can only be caught on North OR South, not both.

areas.name: Wellspring Cave

rosters.title: Back-to-back
rosters.note: Grunt 3 first, then immediately a tag battle — you and Partner Cheren vs Team Plasma Grunt 4 & Seven Sage Bronius. No healing in between.

trainers.name: Team Plasma Grunt 4
notes: Tag battle — fought together with Seven Sage Bronius.

trainers.name: Seven Sage Bronius
notes: Tag battle — fought together with Team Plasma Grunt 4.

rosters.title: Partner Cheren
rosters.note: Your ally in the tag battle — Cheren's team depends on your starter.

notes: Seven Sage Bronius and Team Plasma Grunt 4

areas.name: Route 3 South
notes: Rustling grass can only be caught on North OR South, not both.

areas.name: Nacrene City
notes: Archen/Tirtouga is pre Elesa, Aerodactyl is pre Skyla

trainers.name: School Kid Sammy (Right)
notes: You have to fight one of the two to get back to Nacrene City

areas.name: Castelia City
notes: Grass can be found right outside the gym
The Rest TM, 2nd eviolite and npc that gives either a fire, water or leaf stone can still be found here

moves: PUT IT TO RIGHT FORM MANUALLY)

trainers.name: Rival Bianca 2 (No sand for this fight)
Rival Bianca 2 (No sand for this fight)
Rival Bianca 2 (No sand for this fight)
Parasol Lady April (YOU CAN GO TO DESERT RESORT AFTER THIS FIGHT)
Backpacker Keane (MANDATORY TO GET ACCESS TO DESERT RESORT)
Veteran Purkat (GUARDS INSIDE OF DESERT RESORT)

areas.name: Nimbasa City
notes: Grass can be found right when you enter from route 4
Juniper gives 900 Ultra Balls in Nimbasa Gate

rosters.title: Back-to-back
rosters.note: Rival Cheren 4 first, then immediately a tag battle - you and Partner Cheren vs Preschooler Billy & Sarah. You can't switch teams between the two fights.

trainers.name: Preschooler Billy
notes: Preschooler Billy and Preschooler Sarah (TAG BATTLE CAN’T SWITCH TEAMS BETWEEN THIS AND CHEREN 4)
Tag battle - fought together with Preschooler Sarah.

trainers.name: Preschooler Sarah
notes: Tag battle - fought together with Preschooler Billy.

rosters.title: Partner Cheren
rosters.note: Your ally in the Billy & Sarah tag battle - Cheren's team depends on your starter.

trainers.name: Team Plasma Grunt 10 (far most right grunt)
Gym Leader Clay
notes: Don't forget about the Shed Shell trainer in route 3, it will be very helpful for this fight

areas.name: Mistralton City
notes: Grass can be found to the right of the pokecenter
Mart guy who gives TM07, TM11, TM18 and TM37 has been removed

trainers.name: Ace Trainer Beckett (YOU CAN PRESS B TO ROTATE BECKETT AND KASSANDRA)

rosters.title: Back-to-back
rosters.note: You can't leave between these two fights.

trainers.name: Lady June
trainers.reward: 1 of each resist berry and guards Guidance Chamber encounter

trainers.name: Team Plasma Grunt 23
trainers.b2b: BACK TO BACK TO BACK TO BACK WITH THE NEXT 3 GRUNTS, NO HEALING IN BETWEEN

areas.name: Route 9
notes: Vitamin vendor from Shopping Mall Nine has been removed
PP Up in Shopping Mall Nine removed

areas.name: Opelucid City
notes: Grass can be found on the walkway to Drayden’s house, left of the pokecenter

areas.name: Route 10
notes: you get an encounter both in the route and badge gate sections
